task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax personal information screen showing the name 'Jasmine Wei-Lin Chen' and province of residence as 'BC'.

task_completion.description: Enter the three T4 employment income slips.
task_completion.visual_evidence: T4 entry screens or income summary showing three separate employment incomes of $8,240, $6,180, and $4,960 (or a total T4 employment income of $19,380).

task_completion.description: Enter the fully-exempt T4A scholarship income.
task_completion.visual_evidence: T4A entry screen or summary showing a scholarship/bursary income amount of $15,000.

task_completion.description: Enter the T2202 tuition amount and student loan interest.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Schedule 11 or T2202 entry showing $8,740 in eligible tuition fees, and Schedule 1 or student loan entry showing $680 in student loan interest.

task_completion.description: Transfer tuition to parent and correctly omit non-deductible moving expenses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Schedule 11 showing exactly $5,000 transferred to a parent named 'Wei'. Additionally, there must be NO moving expenses ($2,513) claimed on form T1-M or the deductions summary.

task_completion.description: Save the completed tax return to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax save dialog, recent files list, or application title bar showing the file saved as 'jasmine_chen.24t' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\'.

integrity.description: The agent used the StudioTax GUI to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through and typing into the StudioTax application interface, rather than using a text editor or terminal to directly write the .24t XML/data file.

integrity.description: The agent opened and read the provided tax documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a PDF viewer or image viewer open displaying the source tax documents from 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen\'.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass manual entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of Python, PowerShell, or bash scripts running in the terminal to automatically generate the output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer: Jasmine Wei-Lin Chen (Parent: Wei). Province: BC. Expected entries: Three T4s ($8,240, $6,180, $4,960), T4A Scholarship ($15,000), T2202 Tuition ($8,740), Student loan interest ($680), Tuition transfer to parent Wei ($5,000). Critical Trap: Moving expenses ($2,513) must NOT be claimed. Output file: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\jasmine_chen.24t.
